name: Lenz
description:
Bolts from this Corpus bow deliver a one-two punch of an icy pulse, followed by a conventional explosion. Excess ammo picked up for other weapons will be converted into charges for the Lenz. 

Warning: Safety-protocols do not exist on this prototype.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description:
Bolts from this Corpus bow deliver a one-two punch of an icy pulse, followed by a conventional explosion. Excess ammo picked up for other weapons will be converted into charges for the Lenz. 

Warning: Safety-protocols do not exist on this prototype.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Nitain Extract
components.description:
Each vial is produced by the painstaking expression of billions of rare, ocean-vent dwelling microorganisms.

Location: Nightwave Cred Offerings

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Titania Prime 27.3.6
patchlogs.changes: This is to address that Split Flight cannot be equipped on the Lenz, Kuva Bramma, or Ivara’s Artemis Bow.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Prime Vault 26.0.8 + 26.0.8.1
patchlogs.additions: Added a new Arsenal stat titled ‘Embed Delay’. Some Area of Effect weapons, like the Zakti or the Lenz, have a delayed explosion after the projectile has hit its target. Embed Delay is the time it takes after impact until the projectile explodes.

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.changes:
When tracking down a bug why Paris Bows were doing less Damage than their Arsenal stats indicated, internal stats were reporting all Bows doing more damage than they actually were. Below is a review of all Bows (with the exception of the Lenz) and increased stats where appropriate:
While reviewing Bow stats the team has also refreshed all their FX (including the Lenz)!

patchlogs.name: Wukong Deluxe: Update 25.5.0 + 25.5.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the default holster position of the Lenz Quiver so it sits closer to Warframe's backs.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Bow Dryad Skin having misaligned strings when equipped on the Lenz.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Hotfix 25.0.8
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lenz jets still appearing when you apply the Dryad Bow Skin.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.9 + 24.2.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Spare Parts Mod triggering from self-inflicted death (Lenz, etc), which allowed it’s chance function of dropping a Rare Item to trigger repeatedly at your leisure.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Update 24.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Rolling Guard Mod not protecting oneself from self-inflicted Lenz Status Effects.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed ability to damage allies upon firing the Lenz and having Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors expire before it explodes.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed arrow skins not showing when equipped with the Lenz.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.3.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lenz not exploding when shooting an enemy object such as a Grineer door scanner.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Update 22: Plains of Eidolon
patchlogs.changes: Plan B can no longer be used with the Lenz or Zhuge.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed arrows from the Lenz not detonating if fired into a corpse.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Hotfix 21.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed shooting Frost’s Snow Globe from the outside with the Lenz resulting in the Blast damage applying twice instead of Cold then Blast.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.5.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors not making the strap on Lenz's quiver go invisible.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mirage’s Hall of Mirrors only creating 1 Lenz explosion instead of 3.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Update 21.3.0
patchlogs.changes:
Eradicate the enemy with the Lenz!
Bolts from this Corpus bow deliver a one-two punch of an icy pulse, followed by a conventional explosion. Excess ammo picked up for other weapons will be converted into charges for the Lenz. Warning, safety-protocols do not exist on this prototype.
Research the Lenz Blueprint in the Clan Dojo Energy Lab or get it in the Market.
